tools.name: analyze_tone
tools.description: Analyze the tone and sentiment of text. Returns detected tones, formality level, and word-level analysis.

tools.name: rewrite_tone
tools.description: Rewrite text in a target tone (professional, casual, formal, urgent, empathetic).

tools.name: compare_tones
tools.description: Compare the tone of two text samples.

tools.name: suggest_tone
tools.description: Suggest the best tone for a given context and audience.
